head.title: Fran Aragón | Software Engineer building scalable digital products
head.description: Software Engineer based in Prague specializing in building scalable SaaS platforms, high-performance web applications, and native iOS products.
head.keywords: software engineer, product engineer, SaaS development, software architecture, web platform development, React, TypeScript, Next.js, tech partner Prague

cookies.message: We use analytical telemetry to optimize performance. No personal data stored.

cookiesPolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiesPolicy.intro: This platform uses analytical metrics to anonymously understand user interaction and optimize system performance.
cookiesPolicy.whatAreCookies: Small local data fragments used strictly for performance telemetry and navigation analysis.
typesList: Anonymous analytics used to evaluate performance and improve user experience.
cookiesPolicy.manageText: You can accept or reject analytical cookies through the banner or your browser settings.
cookiesPolicy.personalDataTextPart1: No personal data is collected or stored through cookies on this platform.
cookiesPolicy.changesText: This policy may be updated occasionally to reflect infrastructure improvements.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: Privacy is a fundamental engineering principle. We only use anonymous metrics to evaluate platform performance.

sections.title: 1. Personal Data
sections.text: This website does not collect or store personal data.

sections.title: 2. Analytical Tools
sections.text: Traffic metrics are used only to measure system performance and usage patterns.

sections.title: 3. Contact
sections.text: Email communications are handled securely and never used for tracking.

sections.title: 4. Rights
sections.text: Since no personal data is stored, access or deletion requests do not apply.

sections.title: 5. Policy Changes
sections.text: Updates to our privacy infrastructure will always be reflected here.

about.title: Engineering products that scale.
about.description:
I'm Fran Aragón, a Software Engineer and Frontend Lead specialized in building high-performance digital products.

I design and build scalable SaaS platforms, web applications, and native mobile systems that solve real business problems. My work focuses on clean architecture, performance, and long-term maintainability.

Currently, I lead frontend architecture at Solutia, delivering complex platforms for international clients. Previously, I built tools at adidas’ Innovation team used in global workflows.

I am also the founder behind HomeStocker, a native iOS ecosystem for smart inventory management.

Based in Prague. Working with companies worldwide.
